Article Title: 72 hours before Supreme Court deadline, no addition in West Bengal rolls
Article Text:
PTI image

Watch SC Sets April 21 & 27 Deadline For Voter List Inclusion Ahead of Bengal Polls SC Sets April 21 & 27 Deadline For Voter List Inclusion Ahead of Bengal Polls

Kolkata: Just 72 hours to go from Saturday to Supreme Court’s deadline for adding voters cleared by SIR tribunals, and Election Commission has yet to publish the name of a single person whose voting right has been reinstated and who can participate in the first phase of the Bengal assembly polls on April 23.More than 27 lakh people were excluded from the voters’ list after judicial adjudication, which was the last stage of SIR of electoral rolls that began in Nov 2025. Their fate as electors now depends on the verdict of 19 appellate tribunals set up on SC’s order.The SC has ruled deleted voters from the constituencies going to the polls in the first phase can exercise their franchise in the upcoming elections if their appeals are cleared by April 21. The deadline for the second phase, scheduled for April 29, is April 27.According to an EC source, the tribunals started work on April 13 and disposed of close to 200 cases by Thursday. But Bengal’s chief electoral officer (CEO) Manoj Agarwal said he has no information on how many cases have been disposed of so far or how many have been approved.“The tribunal’s functioning is totally independent of EC and CEO’s office.Until the dashboard is ready, I cannot say how many cases have been disposed of by the tribunals. The EC is trying its best to launch the dashboard as soon as possible,” he said. All 19 tribunals, each headed by a retired judge, are functioning from an institute in Kolkata’s Joka. The retired judges arrive at 10am and work till 5-6pm. “Cases are being disposed of regularly. While some logistical and infrastructural hitches remain, work is going on,” said a retired Calcutta high court judge who heads one of the tribunals.Asked how to access the tribunals’ orders, he said: “Keep an eye on the EC website.” To questions about how the appellants will know whether their names have been cleared, Agarwal said: “Voters will be informed of the decision through their BLOs. There are other means as well.
Article Summary: SC Sets April 21 & 27 Deadline For Voter List Inclusion Ahead of Bengal Polls. Election Commission has yet to publish the name of a single person whose voting right has been reinstated. More than 27 lakh people were excluded from the voters’ list after judicial adjudication.

Article Title: I-T raids on Mamata’s proposer & TMC pick raise West Bengal poll heat
Article Text:
.

Watch Mamata Banerjee's Political Journey: From Street Protest To State Power Mamata Banerjee's Political Journey: From Street Protest To State Power

Kolkata: Income tax officials on Friday raided Mamata Banerjee ’s poll nomination proposer, Miraj Shah, and TMC candidate Debashis Kumar, prompting the Bengal CM to call BJP “spineless cowards”.Shah was Banerjee’s proposer in Kolkata’s Bhowanipore. Kumar is seeking re-election from Rashbehari, a high-profile constituency nearby.The I-T raids mark a significant escalation of the face-off between the Centre and the Banerjee-led TMC govt less than a week before the state votes in the first phase on April 23. “BJP will have to answer for this. You cannot play a dirty game. Ballots, not bullets, win polls,” Banerjee said, calling the raids a “shameless and brazen act” by those who “cannot fight from the front”.The raids on the Elgin Road residence of businessman Shah, also a trustee of one of the state’s biggest private educational institutions, became a talking point. But the bigger showdown unfolded at Kumar’s home.A team of I-T officers reached Kumar’s Manoharpukur Road residence at 5am. According to local residents, central force jawans accompanying the I-T officers jumped over the locked gate to knock on the door.The I-T officials followed and started a search-and-interrogation session that lasted nearly 15 hours.While one I-T team scoured Kumar’s home, another reach-ed his election office a few me-tres away. A third team went to his mother-in-law’s flat in the neighbourhood. A fourth reached a TMC office nearby and a fifth raided the house of Kumar Saha, a close associate.“I don’t know what they found. All I know is I lost a day of campaigning. The outcome of these raids will be known on May 4. This will only help me,” Kumar said after the I-T team left around 8pm.ED had earlier questioned him twice in a land grab and illegal construction case.A lawyer who arrived at the house was denied entry. Kumar had a Friday deadline to submit poll-related expenditure. But his agent, Rakesh Kamath, who came to get docum-ents signed was also stopped. Soon, TMC workers arrived and started protesting. By no-on, locals had joined the them.Sensing the situation was getting tense, Kumar sent out instructions that there should be no trouble.“The I-T officers have the right to interrogate politicians, not harass them. I won’t leave till Kumar is freed from their clutches,” said Jayanta Manna, his childhood friend. Neighbours also waited for the I-T officers to exit. “This is simply harassment,” said Supriti Maitra, a model who stays close by.Kolkata: Income tax officials on Friday raided Mamata Banerjee’s poll nomination proposer, Miraj Shah, and TMC candidate Debashis Kumar, prompting the Bengal CM to call BJP “spineless cowards”.Shah was Banerjee’s proposer in Kolkata’s Bhowanipore. Article Title: ‘This is what my mother wanted’: Behind Lokesh Sathyanathan’s NCAA-winning 8.21m leap
Article Text:
Lokesh Sathyanathan’s 8.21m jump in Fayetteville last month broke his own national record and made him the fourth Indian to win an NCAA Division I title. Now third on India’s all-time list, the feat follows years of injuries and personal loss, with his journey driven by his mother’s last words and his father’s constant presence.

The Road to Fayetteville

Watch Jay Shah’s 2036 Olympic blueprint for India: '8 Medals won’t cut it' Jay Shah’s 2036 Olympic blueprint for India: '8 Medals won’t cut it'

The Promise He Keeps to His Mother

His Father’s Support

The Mental Game After Loss and Injury

Discipline After the Celebration

There is a dialogue from the popular Kannada film ‘K.G.F: Chapter 2’ that Lokesh Sathyanathan remembers vividly. It is the moment when the protagonist, in essence, tells his mother, “This is what you dreamed. This is what I am going to conquer.”“I always relate to that scene,” Lokesh tells Timesofindia.com from Texas. “The way he carries the love and the emotion for what his mother did for him. That one word he wanted to hear from her - when I think about it, it gives me goosebumps.”On a tight NCAA night in Fayetteville, Arkansas, Lokesh Sathyanathan jumped 8.21m. That leap bettered his own indoor national record of 8.01m and, more importantly, he became only the fourth Indian ever to win an NCAA Division I title.Also, the distance pushed him to third on the all‑time Indian long jump list behind established names Jeswin Aldrin and Murali Sreeshankar . However, behind that win stood years of injury, loss, and a belief shaped by his mother’s words and his father’s strength.Lokesh, a Health Science undergraduate at Tarleton State University, moved to the USA in 2022 in pursuit of a dream that had already weathered its fair share of roadblocks.Before the US‑bound flights and college tracks, there was a serious accident in Bengaluru that left him with major facial injuries.Then came a freak injury in a gym in Louisville: a teammate dropped weights on his left leg, fracturing the big toe on his take‑off foot. He had to undergo two surgeries, the second one requiring him to travel back to India.“It was not a great year in Louisville,” remembers Lokesh. “I had to go through two surgeries because of that unfortunate incident. That’s when Reliance Foundation stepped in, supporting me through the rehabilitation and my return to the US.”When he came back, he transferred to Tarleton State University to train under Bobby Carter, the head coach who specialises in jumps. “He is the most humble and kind person I’ve met,” Lokesh says. “He genuinely cares. I feel he’s one of my closest friends.”Carter’s coaching, the Reliance‑supported high‑performance environment, and the steady belief of his family stitched together the next chapter of his journey.But, even before the surgeries and the setbacks, there had been a deeper scar. His mother’s passing had left him not just without a parent, but without the anchor he had always spoken dreams to. “I always used to say to my mom, once I’m here, I’ll take you out there,” he says. “I’ll show you the life, the American life, everything. I’ll take you around.”When he jumped 8.21m in Fayetteville, Lokesh looked up. “I knew she would have had happy tears,” he says. “I was looking up to the sky, but it wasn’t just the sky. It was thanking God and my mom. I know they are in the same place, guiding me.”Lokesh remembers his mother’s last words as a firm expectation. “She never asked me for anything big,” says Lokesh. “All she wanted was for me to be great out there. When I remember her face, her smile, and the last thing she said, it just makes me feel, ‘Let’s go.’ If that’s what my mom wanted, and that’s what my dad wants, then that’s what I’m going for.”But for Lokesh, as much as the grief is part of his story, he has turned it into a yardstick by which he measures his own discipline.Lokesh’s father once wanted to be a footballer, but had no support, no structure, no system. He later became a taxi driver for 10 - 15 years, driving late into the night, coming home, and then taking his son to training the next morning.Even now, at 51, he plays regular 90‑minute matches. The physical toll that would break most men is, for him, routine. “That man had nothing,” Lokesh says in awe. “He didn’t get what he wanted. But the love and passion he has for sport, he still goes out there and plays.”Six months before the NCAA title, his father lost his own mother, Paranjyothi. Weeks later, he was still telling Lokesh, “Don’t worry about anything. I’m here. Just believe and keep going.”“It sounds simple,” Lokesh says. “But when you have lost your wife, and then your own mother, and you’re still telling your son to keep going, that’s not simple. That’s a strength. If he can do that, I have no excuse.”Lokesh also has had to fight his own battles. “I have mental health issues, anxieties,” he admits plainly. “After the accident in Bengaluru, after the surgeries, I wondered if I was still good enough to be on the NCAA circuit.”His mother’s words, in that phase, came repeatedly as a reminder. “She always pushed me to dream big,” he says. “Even when I was down, she would say, ‘You have the talent. You just have to believe.’”That belief, once internalised, became his own. He now works regularly with a sports psychologist in the US, treating his mental conditioning with the same seriousness as his physical training. “We athletes are 100% prepared physically,” he says. “But the results come from the mental game. That’s what I’m improving.”He compares his own path to Neeraj Chopra . “No one reaches that level without struggles,” he says. “It’s normal. It depends on how you carry yourself through those phases.”On paper, Lokesh’s 8.21m jump is a record. In the Indian context, it was a statement; the night he won, he did not extend the celebration.“The next day, I woke up, and it was like, okay, I did it,” says Lokesh when asked about the feeling after the win. “I know I won the title. But now it’s next. The next day, I started my training and flush and everything. The feeling was great. It was amazing. I was grateful and thankful to God. But I never let it stop the process.”As for his father, watching from India at 5.30 AM, he had tear‑filled eyes. “He gave me a flying kiss,” Lokesh says. “My aunt was crying in the background. I didn’t stop them. I knew those were happy tears.”When asked what jumping means to him beyond sport, he was direct. “Jumping is my identity. I was born Lokesh Sathyanathan. Today, I am known as Lokesh Sathyanathan, an international long jumper. That is my purpose. I am working for God’s purpose and for his will.”There is no bluster in the way he says it; it is more of a man who has learned, through loss and injury. On the scoreboard, it might read 8.21m, but for Lokesh Sathyanathan, it reads something else: “This is what my mother wanted.”
Article Summary: Lokesh Sathyanathan is the fourth Indian to win an NCAA Division I title. His 8.21m jump in Fayetteville last month broke his own national record. Now third on India’s all-time list, the feat follows years of injuries and personal loss.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Jasprit Bumrah loses cool, hurls run-up marker in frustration amid horror run - WATCH
Article Text:
Jasprit Bumrah (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Watch Shreyas Iyer masterclass & Arshdeep Singh's comeback! PBKS reveal winning formula Shreyas Iyer masterclass & Arshdeep Singh's comeback! PBKS reveal winning formula

Watch Mahela Jayawardene on poor bowling, combinations & team issues Mahela Jayawardene on poor bowling, combinations & team issues

NEW DELHI: Mumbai Indians star pacer Jasprit Bumrah is going through an uncharacteristic lean patch in IPL 2026. Known for troubling the best batters in the world, Bumrah has been taken apart this season, with little going his way. In five matches so far, he has conceded 164 runs without picking up a wicket, operating at an economy rate of 8.63.Against Punjab Kings, there were expectations of a turnaround, but the struggles continued as he returned figures of 0/41.The frustration was visible, with Bumrah seen in a viral video collecting his run-up marker after his over and hurling it in anger.Former India cricketer Irfan Pathan also analysed Bumrah’s dip in form on his YouTube channel and pointed to a possible reason. He highlighted the excessive use of slower deliveries by the Mumbai Indians spearhead."Wickets from Jasprit Bumrah's bowling are very important. There is no major issue with his form, but his average speed this season has been around 130 kmph. He has been using the slower ball about 44 per cent of the time, meaning almost every second ball is a slower one," Pathan said on his YouTube channel."Now why is Jasprit Bumrah doing this? I think this needs a deeper look. If he bowls more fast deliveries and reduces the percentage of slower balls, the results will come. It is a very simple solution. Bumrah does not need coaching, but the numbers are showing what is happening," he added"44 percent slower balls and an average speed below 130 kmph means he needs to increase his pace. Obviously, if you bowl more slow deliveries, your average speed will drop. But if you bring the slower ball percentage down to around 35 percent. If you keep it around 30 to 35 percent and bowl more fast deliveries, your slower balls will become more effective. And if you also get seam and swing, then you can dismiss batters as well," Pathan said.Mumbai Indians have now slipped to their fourth straight defeat of the season and are placed ninth on the points table. They will next take on Gujarat Titans on April 20.
Article Summary: Mumbai Indians star pacer Jasprit Bumrah is going through an uncharacteristic lean patch in IPL 2026. In five matches so far, he has conceded 164 runs without picking up a wicket, operating at an economy rate of 8.63. Mumbai Indians have now slipped to their fourth straight defeat of the season and are placed ninth on the points table.

Article Title: Garret Anderson family: Meet former Los Angeles star’s wife Teresa Anderson and children Brianne, Bailey, and Trey
Article Text:
Garret Anderson (Image Via Getty)

Garret Anderson’s wife Teresa Anderson lived a private life away from public attention

Reuters

Garret Anderson’s children Brianne, Bailey and Trey kept their lives away from media focus

Reuters

Garret Anderson’s legacy goes beyond baseball as Angels remember his impact and character

Reuters

Garret Anderson, former Los Angeles Angels star and 2002 World Series champion, has died at 53 after a medical emergency at his Newport Beach home, according to TMZ. Known for his quiet life, he leaves behind his wife Teresa Anderson and their three children, who stayed out of the public eye.Garret Anderson is survived by his wife, Teresa Anderson, who mostly stayed out of the spotlight during his baseball years. Even when Anderson was at the peak of his career, she chose to keep her life private. There are very few public details about her background or work, which shows how strongly the family valued their privacy. According to, the Los Angeles Angels mentioned Teresa in their official statement, sending their condolences and support to her after Anderson’s passing.Garret Anderson is also survived by his three children, daughters Brianne and Bailey, and his son Garret “Trey” Anderson III. Like their mother, they have stayed away from public attention.reported that all three children were included in the Angels’ tribute message. There is not much public information about their personal or professional lives, as the family always kept things low-key and away from media coverage.Garret Anderson’s legacy is not just about his records. He finished his career with 2,529 hits and remains one of the most important players in Angels history. Angels owner Arte Moreno called him a “cornerstone” of the team and praised his “professionalism, class, and loyalty,” according to. The team has also shared plans to honor him during the season, with players expected to wear a memorial patch. His impact on the game and his quiet personality off the field continue to leave a lasting impression.
Article Summary: Garret Anderson, former Los Angeles Angels star and 2002 World Series champion, has died at 53 after a medical emergency at his Newport Beach home. Known for his quiet life, he leaves behind his wife Teresa Anderson and their three children, who stayed out of the public eye. He finished his career with 2,529 hits and remains one of the most important players in Angels history.

Article Title: Luka Doncic injury update: Los Angeles Lakers get positive expectation for Slovenian star's return timeline
Article Text:
Luka Doncic. Image via: Mark J. Rebilas-Imagn Images

Luka Doncic is expected to return soon to the roster



Lakers enter the playoffs without Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves



The Luka Doncic injury update arrives at a tense moment for the Los Angeles Lakers, with the postseason already underway and their backcourt suddenly uncertain. What looked like a long, open-ended absence for Luka Doncic is now carrying a hint of hope, even if it remains fragile. The team is balancing optimism with caution, aware that one wrong step could reshape their entire playoff run.At the same time, the absence of Austin Reaves adds up to the pressure. Two key creators, sidelined at once, have forced the Lakers to rethink their approach against the Houston Rockets. The timing could not be tougher, but inside the locker room, there is still a belief that help might arrive sooner than expected.There is still no official timeline, yet the tone around Luka Doncic’s recovery has been quite positive. According to insider Jovan Buha, the Slovenian star may be ahead of schedule after seeking treatment overseas. “(Doncic) has the shorter projected timetable, so yes, and he obviously went to Spain to get some treatment,” Buha said.“They’re hoping that could shave off a few days, or even up to a week. So between the two, yes, Luka is expected back first.”That optimism makes sense. Typically, hamstring injuries like his tend to linger, often keeping players out for over a month with a real risk of setbacks. Still, the lack of a firm date leaves room for interpretation. “I think that it’s close between the two, in terms of who would return first, but we did not get an official Luka timetable, so that remains up in the air,” Buha added. “With Austin, it was four to six weeks…Terrible timing. ”Not everyone shares the same outlook. Speaking on the Ryen Russillo Show, Chris Mannix offered a more cautious read. “I think, if you asked the Lakers, they’d say they’re a little more optimistic about Reaves coming back in the series than Luka,” he said.“The risk of re-injury for the hamstring strain, and the significance of it, if you do re-injure it, is something that is a very top concern for the Lakers.”For now, reality is simple. Both guards are out, and the series has already begun. Head coach JJ Redick did not offer much clarity when asked for updates, but said that they’re out for weeks.Together, Doncic and Reaves account for nearly 57 points per game, along with steady playmaking and rebounding. Their absence forces others into larger roles, and the margin for error shrinks.Yet the response inside the team has been deliberate. Practices have carried a sharper edge, with a clear message echoing through the gym. “The word we’ve used all week is ‘elevate.’ I think that’s what it is,” Redick said. “We all know the playoffs are different.”The Rockets bring physical defense and elite rebounding, and without their primary creators, the Lakers must rely on discipline and depth.The question now looms over every game. Not just if Doncic or Reaves will return, but when and at what cost. In a series that could stretch into early May, time remains a factor. So does risk. And for the Lakers, both are shaping every decision they make.
Article Summary: Lakers enter playoffs without Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves. The Slovenian star may be ahead of schedule after seeking treatment overseas. There is still no official timeline, yet the tone around his recovery has been quite positive. The team is balancing optimism with caution, aware that one wrong step could reshape their entire playoff run.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Will Virat Kohli play as Impact Player again today vs Delhi Capitals?
Article Text:
Virat Kohli (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Squads:

Poll What is the most impressive fact about RCB in current season? Only one defeat Strong batting lineup Solid bowling performance Resilience in tough matches

NEW DELHI: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru are set to take on Delhi Capitals in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium on Saturday. In their last outing against Lucknow Super Giants, star batter Virat Kohli was deployed as an Impact Player.Kohli had sustained an ankle injury during the win over Mumbai Indians and did not take the field in the second innings, but still contributed 49 runs against LSG.That raises the key question - will Kohli once again feature as an Impact Player against Delhi Capitals?RCB have been in impressive form this season, suffering just one defeat, which came against Rajasthan Royals. Apart from that, they have recorded dominant wins over Sunrisers Hyderabad, Chennai Super Kings, Mumbai Indians and Lucknow Super Giants, placing them second on the points table.A victory in this game could see them climb to the top. RCB also have a favourable head-to-head record, having won 20 of the 33 matches played against Delhi Capitals, who have 12 wins, with one match ending without a result.As far as team combination is concerned, Kohli is expected to be fully fit and likely to return as a regular player.However, if the team opts to manage his workload, he could once again be utilised as an Impact Player.Following the win over LSG, Kohli admitted he is still regaining full fitness after a knee issue and a brief illness, though he was satisfied with his batting effort."Much better than the last game. I'm still not 100%. My knee was a bit sore in the last game. Even health-wise, I've been under the weather for four or five days now. So, just getting back up to my best. I started well today, so I was happy with my intensity. Again, would have liked to carry on and finish the game off. Sometimes you have to take the conditions into account as well. The pitch slowed down considerably, and I just wanted to keep going in the same manner. But yeah, in the end, should have probably finished that one off as well," Kohli had said after the match against LSG.Royal Challengers Bengaluru: Philip Salt, Virat Kohli, Devdutt Padikkal, Rajat Patidar(c), Jitesh Sharma(wK), Tim David, Romario Shepherd, Krunal Pandya, Bhuvneshwar Kumar, Jacob Duffy, Suyash Sharma, Rasikh Salam Dar, Venkatesh Iyer, Jacob Bethell, Swapnil Singh, Mangesh Yadav, Josh Hazlewood, Jordan Cox, Nuwan Thushara, Vicky Ostwal, Vihaan Malhotra, Abhinandan Singh, Kanishk Chouhan, Satvik Deswal.Delhi Capitals: KL Rahul(wk), Pathum Nissanka, Nitish Rana, Sameer Rizvi, Axar Patel(c), Tristan Stubbs, David Miller, Vipraj Nigam, Lungi Ngidi, Kuldeep Yadav, T Natarajan, Mukesh Kumar, Ashutosh Sharma, Auqib Nabi Dar, Dushmantha Chameera, Karun Nair, Mitchell Starc, Kyle Jamieson, Ajay Jadav Mandal, Prithvi Shaw, Tripurana Vijay, Abishek Porel, Sahil Parakh, Madhav Tiwari
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru take on Delhi Capitals in IPL 2026. Defending champions have won just one match this season. Virat Kohli is expected to be fully fit and likely to return as a regular player. If the team opts to manage his workload, he could once again be utilised as an Impact Player.

Article Title: RCB vs DC: Allan Border set for maiden IPL outing
Article Text:
Allan Border. (Photo by Robert Cianflone/Getty Images)

Watch Mahela Jayawardene on poor bowling, combinations & team issues Mahela Jayawardene on poor bowling, combinations & team issues

BENGALURU: There will be an IPL debut of a rather special kind at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Saturday afternoon. Former Australian great Allan Border is set to watch his first-ever match in the competition when Royal Challengers Bengaluru take on Delhi Capitals.Border last visited the venue as captain of the Australian side during the World Series on October 27, 1989 — an ODI that India won by three wickets. More than three decades later, the 70-year-old returns, this time as a spectator, to witness the spectacle of the IPL 2026.In India on an invitation from fellow legend and close friend Sunil Gavaskar , Border is also expected to attend matches in Kolkata and Mumbai during his visit.In Bengaluru, the former Australian captain will be hosted by the Karnataka State Cricket Association.“We are delighted to have the legendary Allan Border and host him for his first IPL experience. When Sunny bhai reached out, we told him it’s an honour for us to host Border. It’s a wonderful initiative by Sunny bhai to invite his friend for the IPL experience,” KSCA president and former India pacer Venkatesh Prasad told TOI.Border, who arrived in the city on Friday evening, is accompanied by his son, Dene.
Article Summary: Allan Border to watch his first-ever match in IPL 2026. Royal Challengers Bengaluru take on Delhi Capitals on Saturday. Border last visited M Chinnaswamy Stadium during World Series in 1989. The 70-year-old will also attend matches in Kolkata and Mumbai.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Impact role again on the cards for Virat Kohli?
Article Text:
Royal Challengers Bengaluru's Virat Kohli during a warm-up session. (ANI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

BENGALURU: Ahead of Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s previous outing against Lucknow Super Giants, Virat Kohli cut an unusual figure. The superstar opener went through his pre-match routine with his knee strapped, already nursing an ankle niggle picked up during the away game against Mumbai Indians. When the team sheet was announced, his name appeared in an unfamiliar column — among the reserves.For a player who thrives on being in the thick of the action, watching from the dugout would have been far from ideal. Yet, Kohli made his presence felt when it mattered, walking in to open the innings during the chase as an Impact Player. It was the first time Kohli was seen in that role. He slipped seamlessly into top gear, scoring 49 off 34 balls to steer the chase.After the win, Kohli revealed the extent of his discomfort. “My knee was a bit sore last game. Even health-wise, I’ve been under the weather for four or five days,” he said.Not one known to be a strong advocate of the Impact Player rule, Kohli nevertheless embraced the role when circumstances demanded it. Given the intensity with which he approaches the game, adapting to such situations may become necessary as the season progresses.Teammate Josh Hazlewood confirmed that Kohli is set to feature against Delhi Capitals on Saturday, though he did not rule out the possibility of him continuing as an Impact Player.“I think he’ll definitely play. It’s just whether he’s right to take the field. It’ll be precautionary, and we’ll keep using the Impact Player role for as long as he needs to,” Hazlewood said.Highlighting the utility of the rule, the Australian pacer added, “He’s probably fortunate we’ve got that option. A lot of teams use it for someone coming back from injury or carrying a niggle. It’s invaluable when your main skill can still contribute.”Hazlewood, however, acknowledged that keeping Kohli away from the field is easier said than done. “Obviously I'd love to have him on the field. He's got great energy, one of our best fielders. But knowing him, he's not a great watcher of cricket. He loves to be out there and having an impact. So I think he'll be with the physios trying to get back out there."
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru beat Lucknow Super Giants by eight wickets. Virat Kohli scored 49 off 34 balls to steer the chase. Kohli played as an Impact Player for the first time in his career. Josh Hazlewood confirmed that Kohli is set to feature against Delhi Capitals on Saturday.

Article Title: Angie Mentink: Mlb reporter Angie Mentink gives perfect response after viral video shows her using AI for Seattle Mariners question
Article Text:
Mlb reporter Angie Mentink gives perfect response after viral video shows her using AI for Seattle Mariners question (Image via Getty)

Angie Mentink responds to AI backlash with honesty and humor

Angie Mentink’s journey, health battles, and fan support stand out

Angie Mentink did not hide when a short video of her using AI went viral. Instead, she faced it head-on. The clip showed her looking up “good questions after a tough loss in baseball” before speaking to the Seattle Mariners. Some people online mocked her. But within hours, Mentink gave a calm and honest reply, and many fans stood by her side.The video was only four seconds long, but it spread fast. A fan recorded it without her knowing and posted it online with a sarcastic caption. The goal was clear, to question her work.But Mentink did not react with anger. She went on X and wrote, “Currently asking AI how to handle going viral for using AI.”Then she explained things clearly. “In all seriousness, I’m late to the AI party. Earlier this season I experimented with AI to see if it had any questions to add to my list for my postgame coverage. We’ve come a long way from pen and paper when I started in 1997. Always learning.”That line changed the tone. Instead of defending herself, she showed how the job has changed over time. From notebooks to digital tools, she made it clear she is still adapting like everyone else.Mentink works with Root Sports and has covered the Mariners since 1997. That long journey gave weight to her words. This was not someone cutting corners. This was someone trying something new after decades in the field.There is more to Mentink’s story than one viral moment. Earlier this year, she returned to reporting after a stroke in February. Years before that, in 2017, she was diagnosed with breast cancer.In an interview with Seattle Met, she spoke openly about her life. “I think that people see themselves in me a lot. Just being a mom…I gain weight, I lose weight, I have breast cancer, I have the same struggles as anybody else.”She added, “There is no such thing as losing. You either win or you get better.”Those words explain why many fans quickly supported her after the video. Comments poured in praising her work and her strength. One fan wrote, “Don’t listen to the haters, you’re the best.” Another added, “Thank you for all you do, Angie. One of the best people around the M’s.”Meanwhile, the Mariners moved on from their 7-6 loss to the San Diego Padres and prepared for the next game. But the bigger moment stayed online, a reminder that even experienced reporters are still learning.
Article Summary: Angie Mentink was mocked after a video of her using AI went viral. Within hours, she gave a calm and honest reply to her critics. She has covered the Seattle Mariners since 1997. She returned to reporting after a stroke in February and was diagnosed with breast cancer.

Article Title: Antonio Felix Da Costa: After Formula E wins, Antonio Felix da Costa set for WEC comeback at 6 Hours of Imola
Article Text:
Antonio Felix Da Costa (Image credit: Instagram)

Antonio Felix da Costa returns for 6 Hours of Imola



Antonio Felix da Costa’s Formula E performance



Antonio Felix da Costa is riding high after securing two consecutive wins in Formula E this season. The Jaguar TCS Racing driver triumphed in Jeddah before going on to win the maiden Madrid E-Prix. The 34-year-old has now confirmed his return to the World Endurance Championship, with a drive in the 6 Hours of Imola.Antonio Felix Da Costa’s return to the World Endurance Championship was confirmed via the series’ official social media channels. An Instagram post read: “Return of the DAC. After two seasons away, @afelixdacosta is back in WEC, this time with @alpine_endurance_team. Could a podium be on the cards this weekend?”Da Costa simply replied “Voilà” in the comments. He will take part in the iconic Imola race as part of the Alpine team. The event is scheduled to take place at Italy’s Autodromo Internazionale Enzo e Dino Ferrari from 17–19 April, with the race set to begin at 1 pm local time on 19 April.Da Costa last competed in the championship in 2023 with Hertz Team Jota in the Hypercar category.Antonio Felix Da Costa currently sits fourth in the Formula E Drivers’ Standings with 64 points following his back-to-back victories. He is just one point behind his team-mate Mitch Evans.After a slow start with Jaguar TCS Racing following his move from Porsche, da Costa secured his first win with the team in Round 5 in Jeddah. He followed that up with another victory in Round 6 in Madrid.Speaking after his double win, da Costa said, “Back-to-back wins, a 1–2 for the team - that doesn’t happen often! Massive congratulations to all the boys and girls back in the UK providing us with these cars. It’s kind of a home race for me. I have a lot of friends and family here and it’s a bit of a dream day. We’re both winners, we both wanted to win, we just got different messages. We’ll work it out. I’m happy for Mitch [Evans], he must have done an amazing race, I’ve got to go back and watch that because he came from the back! I’m happy with what we executed today, and it’s a dream day. ”He is using the current break in the Formula E calendar to compete in the World Endurance Championship. He will return to Formula E action for the Berlin double-header, scheduled from 1–3 May.Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Summary: Antonio Felix da Costa has confirmed his return to the World Endurance Championship. The 34-year-old will drive for the Alpine team in the 6 Hours of Imola. He is currently fourth in the Formula E Drivers’ Standings with 64 points.

Article Title: Auston Matthews Trade Rumors: Vegas Golden Knights emerge in rumors surrounding a possible Auston Matthews and Mitch Marner reunion, amid trade speculations
Article Text:
Auston Matthews trade rumors swirl among NHL analysts as they predict a big trade by the Toronto Maple Leafs in 2026 (Image via Imagn Images)

NHL rumors link the Vegas Golden Knights to a potential Auston Matthews and Mitch Marner reunion

Watch Matthews leaves door open on future in Toronto | Insider Trading Matthews leaves door open on future in Toronto | Insider Trading

As speculations regarding Auston Matthews’ trade have mounted, another rumor is swirling around the corner that the Vegas Golden Knights are reportedly planning to reunite Auston Matthews and Mitch Marner. Reports suggest that the possibility of a reunion between Auston Matthews and Mitch Marner is gaining traction, as uncertainty surrounding the Toronto Maple Leafs’ future will open the door to potential blockbuster moves.Marner, who joined Vegas in a sign-and-trade deal in 2025 on an eight-year, $96 million contract, has quickly become a key offensive driver for the Golden Knights, and during their time in Toronto, Matthews and Marner combined for hundreds of goals and were widely regarded as one of the NHL’s elite pairings.Amidst his trade speculations, top NHL teams like the San Jose Sharks and the Utah Mammoth have emerged as potential trade fits for Matthews, if the Maple Leafs star decides to move. Now, as rumors suggest, the Golden Knights have joined the bandwagon to acquire Matthews.The Vegas Golden Knights have emerged in rumors, as reports are hinting at the possibility of a blockbuster move involving Auston Matthews . Rumors are floating that the Vegas Golden Knights are possibly trying to form a reunion of both Matthews and Marner by acquiring the Maple Leafs captain.This assumption arose as the Maple Leafs captain, Auston Matthews, has been dominating the headlines amid trade speculation.The idea is to bring them together as the duo was the most offensive pair in the league during their time with the Toronto Maple Leafs, consistently driving scoring and playmaking.Following the early exit, Auston Matthews had the full opportunity to reinforce his full commitment to the Toronto Maple Leafs, but instead, he left the door open for anything. When asked about his future with the Leafs, Matthews stated, “I can’t really predict the future,” adding that it’s an honor to be captain and wear the jersey, but he’s unsure what lies ahead with new leadership coming.Though the player has shown confidence and taken accountability for the team despite the loss, his comments did not sound fully confident or strongly committed to staying with the Maple Leafs. He is not completely sure of staying with the team.However, according to YarkBarker, while the idea of reunion in the Vegas Golden Knights seems exciting, the trade is unlikely. Even after an injury-hit season, Matthews still has very high value, and unless he pushes for a move, Toronto is likely to get better offers elsewhere.Meanwhile, the 28-year-old forward will also be entering year three of the four-year, $53 million extension he signed with the Maple Leafs in 2023 next season, making the trade possible only if at all the Golden Knights move with the decision; however, it is still speculation, and nothing has been confirmed so far.
Article Summary: NHL rumors link the Vegas Golden Knights to a potential Auston Matthews and Mitch Marner reunion. Reports suggest that the possibility of a reunion between Matthews and Marner is gaining traction. The idea is to bring them together as the duo was the most offensive pair in the league during their time with the Toronto Maple Leafs. However, while the idea of reunion seems exciting, the trade is unlikely.

Article Title: Demis Hassabis: Google AI CEO Demis Hassabis on why he refused to move to California from London after DeepMind was bought by Google in 2014: I wanted to show that ...
Article Text:
Demis Hassabis on issue of AGI safety

Google AI CEO Demis Hassabis ’s 10 pm to 4 am shift to execute “side projects”





Google AI CEO Demis Hassabi has revealed why he chose to stay in London instead of moving to Silicon Valley after Google acquired DeepMind in 2014. Speaking at an event in London hosted by Intelligence Squared, Hassabis said that he chose to stay because wanted to prove that world-class AI work could happen outside the US. “There’s a bit of an underdog in me,” Demis Hassabis said adding “I wanted to show that I’m passionate about the U.K. and that London and the U.K. could do this. But the main thing was: I knew there was the talent here”. Continuing further, he said “I knew we would have the field to ourselves for about four or five years, the formative years of DeepMind, and we had this incredible talent that was being overlooked in the U.S.”“And with the success of DeepMind and a few other companies here, it’s shown that deep tech can be viable outside of Silicon Valley. Of course, the U.S. giants have realized this, both the VCs and the big tech companies, and they’ve invested now—many of them have their European head offices here in the U.K. and in London,” he added.Stressing on the issue of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) safety, Hassabis said “At the back of my mind, I’ve got this gnawing feeling that there’s something much more important, much bigger than the commercial race, which is getting AGI safely over the line for humanity and to make sure that the benefits fully outweigh the risks.”“And, you know, I’m going to try. We’re only one actor in this now; there’s five or six [other] leaders, and there’s China as well, and the Chinese labs. And so I think in the next few years, the story is still to be written on how this is going to go,” Hassabis continued adding”“There needs to be more cooperation and coordination at an international level, ideally—although that’s very hard with geopolitics as it is today—around safety topics and debates around the benefits versus the risks.”During the discussion, Demis Hassabis also revealed that he has two workdays—daytime hours that most of us do, and a 10 pm to 4 am shift to execute “side projects” and other smart ideas. He said:“Using all my chess training [Hassabis was a recognized master-level chess player by the age of 13], that’s the way I think about life. In a very considered way, planning back from your goal, breaking that down into sub-goals. I think it’s generally applicable to life, or at least that’s what I’ve tried to do, and it’s been pretty effective.”
Article Summary: Google AI CEO Demis Hassabis has revealed why he chose to stay in London instead of moving to Silicon Valley after Google acquired DeepMind in 2014. “There’s a bit of an underdog in me,” Hassabis said adding “I wanted to show that I’m passionate about the U.K.”

Article Title: Hailee Steinfeld: Josh Allen, Hailee Steinfeld step out glowing after welcoming their first child

(Image via TheImageDirect.com)

Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld Go From New Parents to Wedding Guests in 24 Hours



"Special Delivery."

"Our baby girl has arrived!! We're feeling incredibly grateful and blessed...

thank you so much for the love."

The Buffalo Bills have a new "little cheerleader," and the parents are already back on the scene! Just hours after announcing the birth of their first child, superstar QB Josh Allen and his wife, actress Hailee Steinfeld , made their first public appearance and they did it in style.The couple wasn't just out for a casual dinner, they were celebrating at the star-studded wedding of Josh’s best friend, Seattle Seahawks quarterback Sam Darnold.The news first broke on Thursday. Hailee took to her lifestyle newsletter, Beau Society, to share the heart-melting news with a post titledShe confirmed to her fans that she and Josh had welcomed a baby daughter.Hailee wrote:Fans had been speculating for months, so the official confirmation sent the internet into a total meltdown.You might think new parents would be stuck on the couch with diapers and lullabies, but Josh and Hailee had a very important date to keep. Literally one day after the big announcement, the pair showed up at the Rancho Valencia Resort in California for Sam Darnold’s wedding.Josh and Sam aren't just "co-workers." Article Title: Northernlion Supercruise: Northernlion cancels Supercruise after safety concerns and fan backlash
Article Text:
Image Via Reddit

Northernlion Supercruise cancellation follows growing safety concerns and fan reaction

“miscalculation”







Northernlion, the highly popular Twitch streamer, has decided to cancel his controversial Supercruise event amidst harsh reactions by his fan community. The cruise, which was supposed to take place in 2027, had quickly become a viral topic because of its unusual concept and high ticket prices. Many viewers started questioning whether the event was safe and realistic. As discussions grew online, concerns about safety and planning began to spread. Soon after, Northernlion decided to stop the project completely and address the situation publicly.The Supercruise was first announced as a six-day fan experience sailing from Tampa, Florida to Mexico. It included meet-and-greets, live shows, and interactive sessions with creators. However, as the details emerged, many fans did not believe at first that he really meant it. Some thought it might have been just another of his jokes. The situation became more serious when safety concerns were raised, leading to more pressure on the streamer.Northernlion explained during a livestream that the decision to cancel the Supercruise was not easy. He said that after reading fan reactions, he started feeling uncomfortable about the risks involved.Online discussion started when people realized the danger of possible injuries that may result from the Supercruise voyage. Safety was thus a key factor that forced the streamer to reconsider the event.He also called the project aand admitted that he may have rushed into planning something too big without fully understanding the challenges. The streamer said that safety for both fans and guests was the most important thing, and if that could not be guaranteed, the event should not continue.Besides, the cost became an issue for many viewers. The prices for tickets were rather steep, which led to even more controversy about whether they are worth it or not.This created even more confusion and debate online.In the end, Northernlion promised that everyone who booked a spot would get a full refund. He also said he might still share some of the planned activities through his stream, so fans do not lose out completely.
Article Summary: Twitch streamer Northernlion has decided to cancel his Supercruise event. The cruise was supposed to take place in 2027, sailing from Tampa, Florida to Mexico. Many viewers questioned whether the event was safe and realistic. Safety was a key factor that forced the streamer to reconsider the event.

Article Title: Quinn Hughes illness update: Minnesota Wild star defenseman’s availability in doubt for playoff opener against Dallas Stars
Article Text:
Quinn Hughes, who recently joined the Minnesota Wild, was absent from multiple practice sessions due to his illness( Image via Imagn Images)

Quinn Hughes raises concern for Game 1 as illness disrupts preparations for playoffs

Watch The injury to Quinn Hughes is a bit concerning The injury to Quinn Hughes is a bit concerning

Quinn Hughes' health status has become a serious concern for the Minnesota Wild ahead of the NHL playoffs after the star defenseman missed practice due to illness, casting doubt over his availability for Game 1. Reports suggest that Hughes has been absent from multiple practices; however, his team is expecting him to travel. His condition remains day-to-day, leaving uncertainty around whether he will be available for the opening game.Hughes is considered a key player on the Wild team, and his contribution will be valuable in the playoffs due to his excellent performance and playmaking skills. Hughes’ 76 points in 74 games ranked fifth among NHL defensemen, and his 69 assists ranked second. He led the league with an average ice time per game of 27:44, more than a minute over Zach Werenski, who finished second.Minnesota Star would be facing the Dallas Stars in the first round for more than a week, but Quinn Hughes’ illness has raised serious concerns for Game 1, as it has disrupted preparations for the playoffs.According to The Athletic, the star defenseman was expected to be on the team’s charter flight to Dallas. However, Hughes did not fly to Dallas with the team.Instead, he is expected to fly to Dallas on Friday afternoon so he can play Game 1 Saturday evening against the Dallas Stars.Meanwhile, head coach John Hynes acknowledged the situation, noting that Hughes’ participation will depend on how he recovers in the coming days. His absence, even if temporary, could significantly impact the Wild’s defensive structure and transition game heading into a high-stakes playoff matchup.He also stated, “I think mentally and physically, this little break is probably really good, even though he’s under the weather and not feeling well. But I just think, mentally, sometimes just getting away from it is good, but our expectation is he’ll be ready to go (Saturday).”As for his performance, in this season, Hughes scored five goals and 53 points in 48 games for the Wild. His 48 assists were also a single-season team record for defensemen. He reached 50 points in his 43rd game, becoming the fastest player to reach the 50-point mark in franchise history. His presence is indeed very important for the Minnesota Wild to advance further towards the playoffs.Apart from this, rookie Jesper Wallstedt is expected to make his playoff debut over struggling veteran Filip Gustavsson in Game 1, and defenseman Zach Bogosian is expected to return from a lower-body injury for the game.
Article Summary: Quinn Hughes missed practice due to illness, casting doubt over his availability for Game 1. Reports suggest that Hughes has been absent from multiple practices; however, his team is expecting him to travel. His condition remains day-to-day, leaving uncertainty around whether he will be available for the opening game.

Article Title: Megan Rapinoe and Sue Bird confirm breakup after decade together as emotional statement highlights love over conflict
Article Text:
Megan Rapinoe and Sue Bird (Image Via Getty)

Megan Rapinoe and Sue Bird explain their separation and reflect on years of shared life and work

A Touch More

Megan Rapinoe and Sue Bird have shared a personal update that many fans did not expect. After being together for almost ten years, the couple has decided to separate. They confirmed the news in a joint statement, making it clear that the decision was not sudden. It resulted from much contemplation and frank discussion between them.In sports, they have been among the most adored pair. Fans followed their adventure from their first encounter at the Rio Olympics in 2016 to creating a life together. So when they shared this news, it quickly caught attention. Still, both made sure to explain that this decision comes from a place of care, not conflict.In their statement, Megan Rapinoe and Sue Bird spoke openly about their decision. They said, “There really is no smooth or easy way to share this news. After a lot of thought, we’ve made the decision to separate as a couple.” The message was simple but honest.They also made it clear that this was not about anger or distance. “This hasn’t been an easy decision, but it’s one we’ve made together, with so much love, respect, and care for each other,” they shared. That line stood out because it showed how they still value each other, even while going their separate ways.Looking back, they spoke about the life they built over the years. “We’ve shared a whole life over the last decade, through big moments and in quiet ones, and that is something we’ll always carry with us.” It was not just about public appearances or big wins. It was also about the everyday moments that shaped their bond.They did not forget their fans either. The couple thanked the people who supported them throughout their journey. “We are so grateful to this incredible community that has held us up, welcomed us in, and supported us exactly as we are,” they said. Their relationship had become important to many, especially for those who saw them as a strong and open example of love.They also spoke about their podcast,. It was something they built together and clearly valued. “Getting to create A Touch More: The Podcast and build a network around it has been a tremendous joy,” they shared. Even though they are ending this chapter together, they made it clear that what they created still matters.They ended their message on a warm note. “Thank you for being with us through all of it… it means the world to us. With so much love, Megan and Sue.”For now, both Megan Rapinoe and Sue Bird are moving forward separately, but with respect for everything they shared.
Article Summary: Megan Rapinoe and Sue Bird have shared a personal update that many fans did not expect. After being together for almost ten years, the couple has decided to separate. They confirmed the news in a joint statement, making it clear that the decision was not sudden.

Article Title: Lebron James Retirement: LeBron James could retire anytime after rejecting the NBA farewell tour idea
Article Text:
LeBron James. Image via: Tim Nwachukwu/ Getty Images

Per Report: LeBron James Has No Interest in Farewell Tour, Retirement ‘Genuine Possibility’

Cleveland Cavaliers : Fans are dreaming of a homecoming.



: Fans are dreaming of a homecoming. Golden State Warriors : Imagine LeBron and Steph Curry on the same team.



: Imagine LeBron and Steph Curry on the same team. The "Luka" Factor: Some think he stays in LA because he actually enjoys winning with the new younger core.



For years, sports fans have been waiting for the biggest party in NBA history. We all assumed that when LeBron James finally decided to hang it up, he would announce it a year in advance and do a massive "Farewell Tour. " We pictured every stadium giving him gifts, every city doing a tribute video, and LeBron taking one final bow in front of sold-out crowds. But according to a huge new report from Sam Amick at The Athletic, LeBron has officially killed that dream.Sources close to LeBron say the idea of a year-long goodbye is false. LeBron has apparently told people directly that he has zero interest in a farewell tour. He doesn't want the drama, he doesn't want the gifts, and he doesn't want every game to be about him retiring.This news changes everything. Because there is no tour, it means LeBron could literally walk away at any moment. Insiders are saying that retirement after this current season is a "genuine possibility." LeBron is 41 years old now. He’s been dealing with a painful sciatica injury all year, and he’s already achieved everything possible in basketball. If the Lakers get knocked out of the playoffs early by the Houston Rockets, that could be it.The buzzer sounds, he walks off the court, and we never see him play again. No warning. No big speech. Just done.If he doesn't retire, things get even crazier. LeBron will be a free agent this summer. While he’s currently playing a smaller role with the Lakers behind stars like Luka Doncic, other teams are already lining up to grab him.LeBron is a "math guy." He’s going to look at his body, his family, and his chances of winning another ring before he makes a choice. But the biggest takeaway is this: Don’t wait for a farewell tour to appreciate him. Since he isn't giving us a formal goodbye, every playoff game this month could be the final chapter of the greatest career we’ve ever seen. Watch closely, because the King might leave the building without saying a word.
Article Summary: Sources close to LeBron say the idea of a year-long goodbye is false. LeBron has apparently told people directly that he has zero interest in a farewell tour. Insiders are saying that retirement after this current season is a "genuine possibility" LeBron will be a free agent this summer.

Article Title: Ice Spice: Ice Spice gets slapped by fan during wild McDonald’s fight in Los Angeles
Article Text:
Image Via Instagram

Ice Spice fight inside McDonald’s quickly turns chaotic

Conflicting claims emerge after viral video of Ice Spice fan altercation

“Deli”







An outrageous situation involving rapper and streamer Ice Spice is making headlines online as she was slapped by one of her fans at a McDonald's restaurant in Los Angeles. It all started when a young lady approached her inside the restaurant and began speaking to her. Everything seemed fine until the fan tried to join them and made the rappers uncomfortable.Ice Spice along with her friend asked the fan to get off their table. But that wasn’t what really shocked everyone; the fan got mad and started slapping Ice Spice, which made the whole scene extremely uncomfortable.After the slap, things got out of hand very quickly. While the fan's friend dragged her away, Ice Spice leapt over several tables to keep following them. The restaurant quickly became a scene of chaos, where everybody was trying to figure out what exactly happened.More clips from outside the McDonald’s show the argument continuing on the street. At one point, Ice Spice picked up a phone that was dropped during the chaos and reportedly smashed it. The argument did not stop there, as both sides exchanged heated words. In another moment, the same fan appeared to throw another punch, leading to another brief scuffle before things finally cooled down.After the incident went viral, both sides shared very different versions of what happened. Ice Spice’s lawyer said the attack was unprovoked and confirmed that the matter has been reported to the police. He also mentioned that legal action may be taken against those involved.On the other hand, the fan, identified as Vayah, claimed she only approached Ice Spice to show support. She said the rapper was rude and used offensive language, which led to the slap. This has created mixed reactions online, with fans debating who was at fault.Ice Spice is a popular rapper known for songs likeand has also stepped into streaming. She launched her Twitch channel in October 2025 during Paris Fashion Week and has around 49.2K followers, with her last stream taking place about five months ago.

The incident has created mixed reactions online, with fans debating who was at fault. Ice Spice’s lawyer said the attack was unprovoked and confirmed that the matter has been reported to the police.

Article Title: Ice Spice Mcdonald'S Fight: Sauce Gardner’s ex Ice Spice gets slapped by fan in viral McDonald’s fight

NFL Love Stories

While the two eventually went their separate ways (Ice Spice was later linked to NBA star Michael Porter Jr.), NFL fans have never quite let the connection go.That’s why social media went into a frenzy when security footage leaked on Friday, showing the Bronx baddie getting into a physical altercation at the Golden Arches.The footage is cinematic chaos. According to witnesses, words were exchanged, the "fan" didn't like the vibe, and BAM she landed a clean slap across the rapper's face.Ice Spice didn't just sit there; she showed the kind of recovery speed Sauce Gardner would appreciate. The rapper immediately engaged, and the fight spilled out of the restaurant and onto the Hollywood pavement. In a move that’s being memed across the internet, Ice Spice allegedly snatched the attacker's phone and spiked it into the street like a touchdown celebration.Ice Spice’s high-powered attorney, Bradford Cohen, has already confirmed the incident has been reported to the LAPD.Cohen stated.While Sauce Gardner has stayed quiet on the matter, Jets fans are already flooding the comments, joking that if she’d stayed with the "Sauce," she’d have had better coverage.Whether it’s unprovoked fan madness or a "clout-chasing" move gone wrong, one thing is for sure, Ice Spice might rap about the Deli, but she’s clearly willing to throw hands at the McDonald’s.

Article Title: Mats Sundin: NHL insider Elliotte Friedman claims that Toronto Maple Leafs are considering Mats Sudin for a potential role within the organization
Article Text:
Toronto Maple Leafs defenceman Brandon Carlo (25) battles against Maple Leafs forward Matias Maccelli (63) during the opening week of the team's NHL training camp in Toronto, on Thursday, Sept. 18, 2025. (Sammy Kogan/The Canadian Press via AP)

Toronto Maple Leafs to consider franchise legend Mats Sundin for potential management role

The Toronto Maple Leafs are reportedly planning to consider franchise legend Mats Sudin. According to Elliotte Friedman, the Maple Leafs are reportedly in discussions about a potential role within the organization. Sundin is a Swedish former professional ice hockey center widely regarded as one of the greatest Toronto Maple Leafs players in history.As per reports, he was the first European to be drafted first overall in the NHL (1989) and played 18 seasons, mainly for the Quebec Nordiques and Toronto.This move comes in response to MLSE President and CEO Keith Pelley announcing that the Maple Leafs are entering a new phase focused on long-term success and cultural change. Previously, the club had general manager Brad Treliving in a major organizational shake-up.The Toronto Maple Leafs are reportedly planning to collaborate with franchise legend Mats Sundin on a potential role within the organization. The veteran NHL icon Mats Sundin is widely regarded as one of the greatest players in franchise history. He has spent over a decade with Toronto and remains the team’s all-time leader. Sudin was also inducted into the Hockey Hall of Fame in 2012 and has maintained ties with the organization even after retiring.NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman stated that, “It’s unclear when the process began, but the ex-captain is in Toronto and has met with MLSE president Keith Pelley at least once. An advisory role — or something along those lines — is being discussed."Friedman discussed this on his 32 Thoughts podcast that a VP of Hockey Operations role wouldn't be out of the question for Sundin.Meanwhile, confirming the news, Chris Johnston also wrote on his X/Twitter account, “Mats Sundin is in Toronto to meet with the # Leafs about a potential role in the new management structure, per sources.”Earlier, the Hockey Hall of Famer attended the Leafs’ training camp in 2024, where he spent nearly a week engaging in activities that went far beyond typical alumni appearances.Reports are suggesting that bringing Sudin into a leadership role could change the growth trajectory of the Maple Leafs. His deep understanding of the franchise and its culture may prove valuable as Toronto is currently looking forward to rebuilding the team both on and off the ice.With the Maple Leafs entering a critical offseason with a new general manager and potential management changes, the team’s future will be determined by the decisions made in the coming months.
Article Summary: Toronto Maple Leafs to consider franchise legend Mats Sundin for potential management role. Sundin is a Swedish former professional ice hockey center widely regarded as one of the greatest Toronto Maple Leafs players in history. The move comes in response to MLSE President and CEO Keith Pelley announcing that the Maple Leafs are entering a new phase focused on long-term success.

Article Title: Clavicular Overdose Controversy: Kick streamer Clavicular avoids father after overdose incident as Miami club appearance raises serious questions

Clavicular (Image Via Getty)

TMZ

Clavicular avoids father Ken Peters despite Miami overdose incident and planned intervention

TMZ

TMZ







Clavicular is once again in the spotlight, but this time the situation feels more serious than just online drama. After a suspected overdose earlier this week in Miami, his father, Ken Peters, flew in from New Jersey hoping to talk to his son face-to-face. The plan was simple. He wanted to check on him and convince him to slow down and get proper help.But things did not go the way he expected. According to a report by, Clavicular refused to meet his father. He said he was “busy” and still focused on attending a nightclub appearance that he had already promoted before the health scare. The situation has now raised bigger concerns. What looked like a one-time incident is starting to feel like a deeper personal issue, especially with family getting involved and still being kept at a distance.Sources toldthat Ken Peters rushed to Miami as soon as he heard about the hospitalization. His goal was to have a serious talk with his son after the suspected overdose during a livestream at a restaurant. It was not about public attention or events. It was about family and concern.However, Braden Peters did not meet him. Instead, he chose to go ahead with his scheduled appearance at Bacara Club. This was the same event he had promoted before being hospitalized just a day earlier.He was later seen there, continuing with the plan as if nothing had happened.Interestingly, Braden told viewers during a livestream, “I wanted my dad to come because he was here, but he didn’t come.” But sources close to the situation toldthat this version is not accurate. His father was never supposed to attend the club event. He had come only to support his son and talk to him in private.As the situation became more tense, Ken Peters reportedly left Miami without meeting his son at all. He returned to New Jersey feeling worried and helpless.Earlier, Braden Peters had told his audience that he planned to stop using substances and reduce his livestream activities. But his actions later the same day, especially attending the club event, showed a different picture.Right now, this is no longer just about online content or viral clips. It is clearly a family situation that is getting more serious, with a concerned father trying to step in but being pushed away.
Article Summary: Clavicular's father, Ken Peters, flew to Miami after his son was hospitalized. He wanted to talk to his son face-to-face and convince him to get proper help. However, Clavicular refused to meet his father and went ahead with his nightclub appearance.

Article Title: Arman Tsarukyan: Why was UFC fighter Arman Tsarukyan removed from American Airlines flight at LAX? New details reveal the incident
Article Text:
r Arman Tsarukyan (Image Via Getty)

Arman Tsarukyan and Urijah Faber fight trip disrupted after airline incident

MMA Fighting

It was meant to be a simple flight, but things quickly changed for Arman Tsarukyan. The top-ranked lightweight contender was taken off an American Airlines flight on April 16 before it could even leave Los Angeles International Airport. He was on his way to Philadelphia for an upcoming fight when the situation unfolded.A video that surfaced online showed Tsarukyan being escorted off the plane along with a few of his friends. At first, there were claims that he was using his phone during takeoff preparation. But later details from the airline made it clear that the issue was different and related to safety rules on board.According to a statement shared by American Airlines with, the flight had to return to the gate because some passengers did not follow crew instructions. The airline said, “On April 16, American Airlines flight 513 returned to the gate at Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) for customers who refused to follow federal regulations.”They added, “Safety is our top priority and we expect our customers to comply with crew member instructions while on board our aircraft, which include staying seated while the aircraft is taxiing.”So what really happened? Reports confirmed that Tsarukyan and his group were standing in the aisle while the plane was moving toward the runway.Crew members asked them to sit down in their assigned seats, but they did not follow those instructions. Because of that, the pilot decided to turn the plane back to the gate.In total, four people, including Tsarukyan, were removed from the flight. After that, the plane continued its journey to Philadelphia without any further issues.Soon after the incident, Tsarukyan shared his side in a light-hearted way on Instagram. He posted, “kicked off commercial, I guess private it is.” Later, while boarding another flight, he added, “I hope they’re not going to kick me out from this plane. OK guys, I’ll be five hours in Philadelphia.”Despite the disruption, Tsarukyan still managed to continue his travel plans. He is scheduled to fight Urijah Faber in the co-main event at RAF 8. This will be his fourth appearance in the promotion, following earlier fights against Lance Palmer and Georgio Poullas.The situation did not involve violence, but it clearly showed how strict airlines are about safety rules, especially during taxiing. Even small actions like standing in the aisle at the wrong time can lead to serious consequences.
Article Summary: Arman Tsarukyan was taken off an American Airlines flight on April 16. He was on his way to Philadelphia to fight Urijah Faber in the co-main event at RAF 8. Reports confirmed that he and his group were standing in the aisle while the plane was moving.

Article Title: Sykkuno: Sykkuno’s girlfriend speaks out on allegations and reveals why she chose to stay in relationship
Article Text:
Sykkuno (Image Via Getty)

Sykkuno’s girlfriend explains decision to stay and responds to allegations while calling public exposure painful







The situation around Thomas “Sykkuno” has taken another turn, and this time, it comes from someone very close to him. His girlfriend, who has chosen to stay private, has now spoken publicly for the first time. In a long message, she shared how deeply the situation has affected her and why she decided to stay in the relationship despite everything that has come out.This comes just days after serious allegations were made against Sykkuno on April 10, 2026, through a detailed document shared online. Sykkuno responded on April 16 on X, but now his girlfriend’s words are drawing attention. Her message feels emotional and personal, as she explained that she never wanted their private life to become public in the first place.In her statement, Sykkuno’s girlfriend made it clear that the past few days have been extremely difficult for her. She thanked people who reached out but also shared how overwhelming everything has been. She said, “It’s been extremely heartbreaking to learn everything I know now, and going through this has been one of the hardest things I’ve ever been put through in my life.”She also spoke about how the situation became public without her consent.That part seemed to hurt her the most. She said, “Though no matter how broken I am, I never wanted this to be public. It deeply hurts me that I wasn’t given a choice in that, or even just warned that this would be happening at all. I didn’t want this.”Even after learning things that she described as “incredibly disappointing and shocking,” she explained why she chose to stay. According to her, they were already trying to work on their relationship before everything came out. She said, “While I could have chosen to leave I ultimately made the decision to stay with the hopes of repairing our relationship together.”She also shared her belief that the situation, while serious, is not beyond repair. “Even though all of the things I’ve learned are incredibly disappointing and shocking, I don’t think they are irredeemable,” she added.Another important part of her message was directed at the people who made the allegations. She said she wished they had spoken to her directly. “Even after the fact, I wish they would have at least checked in on me or asked me how I felt about everything,” she said, adding that she has not heard from them since.She described the entire situation as overwhelming and difficult to process. “Having my worst fears become my reality, then put on full display and used for everyone to see is absolutely mortifying. It truly feels like a nightmare,” she said.As of now, the people who made the allegations have not responded to either Sykkuno or his girlfriend. The situation is still unfolding, but her statement has added a very personal side to the story.
